brand.name: dramai
brand.tagline: An AI short-drama studio that runs entirely in your browser

home.intro: dramai is an open-source short-drama studio that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in text / docs / reference images, write a one-liner, and let your own OpenAI-compatible endpoint produce a structured storyboard, images, and clips — without any middleman server.
home.feature1Desc: Upload doc / txt / md or reference images, then describe the vibe you want.
home.feature2Desc: Scene text, narration, image prompts, camera moves — generated, then editable.
home.feature3Desc: Lock a character to a reference image; other roles stay random but different.
home.feature4Desc: OpenAI Images / Runway / Kling compatible — wire up the whole pipeline with one click.
home.pipelineTitle: From raw material to final cut, six stages
home.pipelineDesc: Pause, roll back, or rerun any stage. v0.1 ships up to storyboard generation; the rest land in v0.2–v0.4.

footer.summary: dramai · Apache-2.0 · in-browser AI short-drama studio · local-first data
footer.buildOn: Built on React 19 + Vite 8 · Hosted at

about.title: About dramai
about.intro: dramai is a 100% client-side, open-source AI short-drama studio. It chains "upload material → storyboard → text-to-image → image-to-video → CapCut export" — your data lives only in your browser, and AI calls go straight to the OpenAI-compatible endpoint you configured. Zero backend; fork and deploy to GitHub Pages in minutes.
about.thanksDesc: Architecture and product shape borrow ideas from these two projects:
about.joinDesc: Issues, PRs, and docs are all welcome. Apache-2.0 licensed, commercial-friendly.

notFound.title: This scene didn't make the cut
notFound.desc: The page you tried doesn't exist — or it's in a script that ships after v0.2.
